mapper.sql: a.id, a.student_id, s.name as student_name, a.class_id, c.class_name as class_name, a.attendance_date, a.status, a.remark, a.check_in_user_id, u.real_name as check_in_user_name, a.check_in_time, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM attendance a LEFT JOIN student s ON a.student_id = s.id LEFT JOIN class_entity c ON a.class_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.check_in_user_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance ( student_id, class_id, attendance_date, status, remark, check_in_user_id, check_in_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{studentId}, #{classId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{checkInUserId}, #{checkInTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE attendance
status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, check_in_user_id = #{checkInUserId}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE attendance SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO attendance ( student_id, class_id, attendance_date, status, remark, check_in_user_id, check_in_time, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.studentId}, #{item.classId}, #{item.attendanceDate}, #{item.status}, #{item.remark}, #{item.checkInUserId}, #{item.checkInTime}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = VALUES(status), remark = VALUES(remark), check_in_user_id = VALUES(check_in_user_id), check_in_time = VALUES(check_in_time), update_time = NOW()
